granted_abilities.text: This model receives +2 to its Df and may not be moved by friendly effects. This model gains the following actions:

granted_actions.name: Sentinel’s Embrace
granted_actions.effects: Friendly only. Place the target within 1" of this model.

granted_actions.name: Memories of Granite
granted_actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Df duel or gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Striking Stone
triggers.text: Enemy models that failed to resist this action are dealt 2 damage.

granted_actions.name: Tenacity
granted_actions.effects: Discard a card. This model heals 2.

name: Soaring Dragon
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: Flight
granted_abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving. This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: Lightning Strike
granted_actions.effects: This action ignores LoS. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Models on terrain Ht 2 or higher suffer a (-) to resist this action.

name: Tragedy Repeats
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: Ashen Ovation
granted_abilities.text: For each raise this model’s attack actions receive, an enemy model within 3" of this model gains an Entranced token. This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: Painted Fury
granted_actions.effects: Once per activation. Place this model anywhere within range. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

name: Wandering River Style
description: This model gains the following actions: 8" 6 Df11 - Move the target up to 4", +4" for each raise (maximum 12"). If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.

granted_actions.name: Enlightened Leap
granted_actions.effects: Once per activation. If a Chi token was used during this action, it has a raise value of 3. Place this model anywhere within range. If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.

universal_triggers.name: Collision
universal_triggers.text: The target and enemy models within

universal_triggers.name: Self-Reflection
universal_triggers.text: This model gains a Chi token.
